chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5269 of 2023 Saleem Butt Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.24222/23 2. For orders on Misc. No.24223/23 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 19.08.2024 Mr. Haider Waheed for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition was filed on account of filing of a criminal complaint before Special Court (Offences in Bank) Sindh at Karachi but the grievance of the petitioner is claimed to have been redressed and as such he has been instructed not to press this petition, unless such criminal complaint is re-agitated, which would give them a fresh cause. Petition is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
